notes: Official/EU page and retailers list 1000W, 5x5/150x150cm class; PPFD 2146 appears in reseller/spec snippets, kept in notes only. | Official AC Infinity spec includes max PPFD 2146 µmol/(m²·s); this is PPFD, not fixture PPF, so ppf_umol_s remains blank. User requested: efficacy_umol_j set to 3.14 µmol/J from official AC Infinity Samsung LM301H EVO single-diode efficiency; PPF derived as power_watts × 3.14 and should be treated as derived/optimistic rather than verified fixture PPF.
uvp_notes: UVP/MSRP not verified yet; column intentionally present for later completion
